1355: Transcribers short version of report. Many of the crew was found in possession of a large quantity of Red Wine and Moonshine liquer. As the Officers and the ship did not contrive to break any laws and the foriegn crew had no conception of breaking laws it was deemed wise to destroy the wine and liquers and take no further action. This was done for the best interests of the cannery. Any other course would have involved loss of hundred and thousands of dollars to a legitimate industry.
